subparts.text: Explain using program i) function overloading ii) private and protected access specifiers
Compare i) call by reference and call by pointer ii) static and nonstatic variables of a class

Design a class Employee that manages employee information, including the employee 's id, name, age and salary. Create a static member that keeps track of the total number of employees instantiated from the Employee class.Also Implement member function in a class to display and set the details of employees.

What is Class and object? Create a Student class and provide appropriate constructor and methods to initialize and display the details of student. Provide a non member function compare_age which will compare the age of two students.
Explain the use of i) default parameters in a functions ii) constructor and destructor

Define a base class BankAccount with details acc no,name,balance and functions to withdraw and deposit in the account. Derive a SavingAccount class from BankAccount with saving type specific information. Create object of both class and display the details
Write a program to overload increment operators in C++.
Create a program to explain use of i) virtual functions ii) multilevel inheritance
